title: ABC9 on ice40 causing "ERROR: Visited AIG node more than once; this could be a combinatorial loop that has not been broken"
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.37+39 (git sha1 4585d60b8, clang 14.0.0-1ubuntu1.1 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

[yb.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14077804/yb.zip)

Run this

### Expected Behavior

That it works, just like when adding `-noabc9` to the `synth_ice40` options.

When run without ABC9, it goes through nextpnr so I doubt there is really a comb loop in there.

### Actual Behavior

```
ERROR: Visited AIG node more than once; this could be a combinatorial loop that has not been broken
```
code_blocks: ERROR: Visited AIG node more than once; this could be a combinatorial loop that has not been broken
